lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Well hello there, how you doing?

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: I'm great now, those goblins can't get close with this cannon blasting at them!

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Don't let any goblins through the breach in our fence!

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Keep an eye open for goblins!

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Don't just do something! Stand there!

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Stop dawdling soldier! You're in the army now!

lines.speaker: Captain Lawgof
lines.text: Hurry up on that patrol route, trooper!
